name: Camp Chetek
description: Come play pickleball at Camp Chetek in Chetek, WI! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Moon Lake Park
description: Come play pickleball at Moon Lake Park in Rice Lake, WI! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets.

name: Old Elementary School Gym
description: Old Elementary School Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cameron, WI. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Rice Lake Cameron Pickleball Association
description: Rice Lake Cameron Pickleball Association is a place to play pickleball in Rice Lake, WI. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms.
